snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    "v1beta",
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.widgets.create(
    name="name",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    "v1beta",
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.widgets.create(
        name="name",
    )


asyncio.run(main())
